description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, conical body. The cone features two broad white horizontal stripes encircling its midsection, which are likely intended to be reflective for visibility in low light. The surface of the cone shows visible signs of wear, including dirt marks and scuffs, suggesting it has been used outdoors. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the body. The base appears thick and sturdy, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping, with a slightly textured finish. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a sturdy square base, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the cone, both white stripes, and the square base with visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, highlighting the cone's conical shape and the continuity of the white stripes.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, with clear visibility of the stripes and base texture.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the same features as the front, with the stripes and base clearly visible and signs of wear.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide white horizontal stripes encircle the cone, one near the middle and one closer to the base; both are likely reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and appears to be made of the same orange plastic as the cone, providing stability and featuring a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs and signs of outdoor use.
